Projects

    (comming soon)

    Notes platforms for competitive game learning journey. Manage and view content from dashboard view, overview stats.

    Tracks games for competitive game. Using private api to visualize data from last weeks.

  • Draftor

    Visit

    Tool for strategy on competitive game. This app is for people that might want a visual experience while talking about this concepts.

About me

I am a 23-year-old self taught programmer with interest in technology, startups, design.

Personally enjoy creating projects that are both practical and address problems through coding.

Open to new roles, I'm currently focused on developing my own projects and committed to continuous learning.
